patterns.description: ((VAR++)) from zero exits with code 1 when set -e is active
patterns.trigger: Script exits immediately after first increment
patterns.fix: Use VAR=$((VAR+1)) instead of ((VAR++)) when set -e is active

patterns.description: Integration tests should self-skip when API key missing, not fail CI
patterns.trigger: Integration test fails with missing API key

patterns.description: Gemini CLI OAuth token expires silently, causing empty output with exit 0
patterns.trigger: gemini command returns empty output with no error message
patterns.fix: Run: gemini auth login to refresh OAuth token

patterns.description: codex exec times out on tasks touching many files
patterns.trigger: codex exec exits after 5min with no output
patterns.fix: Break task into smaller subtasks targeting 1-3 files each

patterns.description: Parallel agents writing to same /tmp filename cause corrupted output
patterns.trigger: Multi-reviewer output is garbled or truncated when run in parallel

patterns.description: Gemini free tier: 15 req/min Flash, 2 req/min Pro. Hits 429 on burst usage.
patterns.trigger: gemini CLI returns 429 or 'Resource exhausted' error
patterns.fix: Add sleep 5 between requests, or upgrade to paid tier with GEMINI_API_KEY

patterns.description: Codex has two surfaces: MCP server (simple calls) and CLI (flags, output capture). Using MCP when you need CLI flags will silently ignore them.
patterns.trigger: Codex behavior doesn't match expected flags (--full-auto, -s read-only, etc.)
patterns.fix: Use codex-worker agent (CLI) when you need flags. Use MCP server for simple direct calls from Claude.

patterns.description: Agent run fails because client config doesn't exist
Template placeholder {{ not replaced in client deliverable
patterns.fix: Check training-builder — client config field mapping to this placeholder is likely missing or empty. Run extraction agent again with clearer notes.

patterns.description: Parallel agent bash processes writing to the same /tmp filename corrupt each other output
patterns.trigger: Multi-model parallel review output is garbled or truncated

patterns.description: Claude Code auto-routing reliability improves from ~80% to ~95% when agent descriptions use explicit IF/WHEN trigger predicates with Do NOT invoke exclusion clauses instead of capability summaries
patterns.trigger: Agent routing misfires on boundary-case tasks
patterns.fix: Rewrite description: Invoke WHEN: [conditions] / Do NOT invoke for: [adjacent domains]

patterns.description: Railway Nixpacks defaults to Node 18 which fails for Next.js 16+
patterns.trigger: Next.js build fails with 'Node.js version required >=20.9.0'
patterns.fix: Add nixPkgs = ["nodejs_22", "npm-10_x"] to [build.nixpacksPlan.phases.setup] in railway.toml and engines.node >=20.9.0 in package.json

patterns.description: Railway CLI fails with 'Multiple services found' when project has multiple services and none is linked
patterns.trigger: railway up returns 'Multiple services found. Please specify a service via the --service flag'
patterns.fix: Run `railway service <service-name>` to link, then use `railway up --service <id>` for deploys
